repair_history.diagnosis:
line 23: Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl_1'.: AGREE cannot reference component implementation directly in type annex -> Remove 'impl_1' from reference, use 'Task' instead
line 23: Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: AGREE cannot reference AADL property names directly in expressions -> Replace 'period' with 'Task.period' or remove the reference
line 23: extraneous input 'ms' expecting ';': Invalid syntax in AGREE expression -> Remove 'ms' and use proper AGREE time syntax
line 23: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in AGREE expression -> Ensure both sides of equality are same type
line 23: named thing must be an expression with a type: Invalid expression in AGREE guarantee -> Rewrite expression to valid AGREE syntax

Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Task.period' as a valid expression; AADL properties are not directly accessible in AGREE contracts -> Replace 'Task.period' with 'Task.impl_1.period' to reference the implementation property directly
Couldn't resolve reference to 'compute_execution_time'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Task.compute_execution_time' as a valid expression; AADL properties are not directly accessible in AGREE contracts -> Replace 'Task.compute_execution_time' with 'Task.impl_1.compute_execution_time' to reference the implementation property directly
Couldn't resolve reference to 'priority'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Task.priority' as a valid expression; AADL properties are not directly accessible in AGREE contracts -> Replace 'Task.priority' with 'Task.impl_1.priority' to reference the implementation property directly

Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl_1'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation-specific property -> Move the AGREE annex block to the component implementation scope
Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation-specific property -> Move the AGREE annex block to the component implementation scope
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation-specific property -> Move the AGREE annex block to the component implementation scope
named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation-specific property -> Move the AGREE annex block to the component implementation scope
Couldn't resolve reference to 'compute_execution_time'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references implementation-specific property -> Move the AGREE annex block to the component implementation scope

Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl_1'.: AGREE expressions reference implementation names directly, but AGREE contracts must be in component type annexes and cannot reference implementation-specific identifiers -> Remove the implementation reference 'Task.impl_1.' from all guarantee expressions
Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: AGREE cannot reference AADL property names directly in expressions; property names are not valid AGREE identifiers -> Replace property references with direct values or use valid AGREE expressions
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch due to unresolved property references resulting in invalid expressions -> Replace invalid property references with valid AGREE expressions or constants
Expression for guarantee statement is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': Invalid expression syntax results in non-boolean type -> Rewrite expressions to form valid boolean conditions
no viable alternative at input 'ms': AGREE does not support AADL unit syntax in expressions -> Remove unit specifications from expressions
Byte_Count (property association) does not point to anything: Invalid property reference in annex -> Remove or correct the invalid property reference
